faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in South Ozone Park?
faqs.answer: South Ozone Park homes typically experience issues with pavement ants, carpenter ants, and odorous house ants. Pavement ants nest under sidewalks and driveways, carpenter ants target wooden structures especially in older homes, and odorous house ants are attracted to kitchens and bathrooms. Our technicians identify the specific species and apply targeted treatments accordingly.
